governance.mutation_pipeline: OperationIntent -> PatchPlan -> Review/Policy -> Apply -> Verify -> AuditReceipt
governance.rollback: Remove unsupported claims from release docs and disable incomplete workflow packs.
governance.exit_criteria: Every baseline capability claim has a fixture, contract smoke, differential oracle, visual regression report or documented limitation.

claims.public_claim: Open and inspect generated baseline PDFs.
Treat malformed PDFs as expected input and report parser diagnostics without mutating bytes.
Build deterministic text/search evidence for simple generated PDFs.
claims.limitation: Complex glyph shaping, OCR and missing ToUnicode cases remain documented corpus placeholders until generated PDF fixtures and oracle results are accepted.

claims.public_claim: Run deterministic render smoke and visual regression comparison for the current null-renderer baseline.
claims.limitation: The current stable evidence is a deterministic null-renderer smoke baseline; production renderer parity must remain a post-launch claim until reference-renderer oracle results are accepted.

claims.public_claim: Plan page operations through the mutation pipeline without auto-approval.
claims.limitation: Apply/save paths and UI page organization remain gated until transaction apply and audit receipts are end-to-end verified.

claims.public_claim: Plan annotation operations through core contracts without bypassing policy.
claims.limitation: Editable annotation preservation and renderer/UI round trips need additional fixtures before public parity claims.

claims.public_claim: Plan AcroForm fill/flatten operations with policy-visible write modes.
claims.limitation: XFA and JavaScript execution are recognized as compatibility gaps and remain disabled or warning-only until sandboxed execution is separately approved.

claims.public_claim: Inspect and plan metadata/XMP changes with explicit scrub policies.
claims.limitation: Standards-grade PDF/A, PDF/UA and PDF/X conformance claims require external oracle reports before public parity claims.

claims.public_claim: Require sanitizing rewrite and verification receipts for secure redaction plans.
claims.limitation: No public claim should imply applied redaction is complete until rewritten output is verified against text/object/OCR oracles.

claims.public_claim: Expose conversion and source-pipeline planning with capability discovery and clear failure modes.
claims.limitation: External converters such as Typst, Quarto, Tectonic, LaTeX, Pandoc and LibreOffice require provider discovery, policy approval and fixtures before output fidelity claims.

claims.public_claim: Track signed-document compatibility as a documented limitation.
claims.limitation: Signature preservation, validation and signing are not public baseline claims until signed fixtures, provenance and oracle expectations are accepted.

claims.public_claim: Track portfolio and attachment workflows as documented limitations.
claims.limitation: Portfolio extraction, attachment preservation and embedded-file mutation are not public baseline claims until fixtures and policy contracts land.

claims.public_claim: Track OCR/searchable-PDF workflows as documented limitations.
claims.limitation: OCR is not enabled in early waves; searchable-PDF conversion remains provider-gated and opt-in.
